chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.S-790 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case For hearing of main case 28-03-2025 Mr. Arslan Khokhar, Advocate along with petitioner. Mr. Miran Bux Shar, Advocate for respondents-M.C, Khairpur. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant A.G. ***** Counsel for respondent No.3 files statement along with original cheque of Rs.1,38,958/ dated 26.03.2025, which is handed over to the petitioner after obtaining acknowledgment receipt. Counsel for respondent No.3 further submits that now entire arrears have been paid to the petitioner; however, this assertion is denied by counsel for the petitioner; however, he is unable to differentiate the same. Under the circumstances, this petition is disposed of leaving the petitioner at liberty to avail other remedy, permissible under the law. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
